languages.text: "То, что ты здесь устроила — не выход. Ты ничего не добьешься своей выходкой. Отпусти заложника".
"What you have done here is not the answer. You will not achieve anything with your stunt. Let the hostage go."
languages.original_text: "То, что ты здесь устроила — не выход. Ты ничего не добьешься своей выходкой. Отпусти заложника".

traits.locale_text: "What you have done here is not the answer. You will not achieve anything with your stunt. Let the hostage go."
"What you have done here is not the answer. You will not achieve anything with your stunt. Let the hostage go."
"What you have done here is not the answer. You will not achieve anything with your stunt. Let the hostage go."

languages.text: 「あなたがここでやったことは答えじゃない。あなたのこの行動で何も達成できない。人質を解放しろ」
languages.original_text: "What you have done here is not the answer. You will not achieve anything with your stunt. Let the hostage go."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたがここでやったことは答えじゃない。あなたのこの行動で何も達成できない。人質を解放しろ。」

languages.text: "Burada yaptığın şey çözüm değil. Bu numaranla hiçbir şey elde edemeyeceksin. Rehineyi bırak."
languages.original_text: "What you have done here is not the answer. You will not achieve anything with your stunt. Let the hostage go."

traits.locale_text: "Burada yaptığın şey çözüm değil. Bu numaranla hiçbir şey elde edemeyeceksin. Rehineyi bırak."

languages.text: «Lo que ha hecho aquí no es la respuesta. Con este numerito no conseguirá nada. Deje marchar al rehén».
languages.original_text: "What you have done here is not the answer. You will not achieve anything with your stunt. Let the hostage go."

traits.locale_text: «Lo que ha hecho aquí no es la respuesta. Con este numerito no conseguirá nada. Deje marchar al rehén».

languages.text: “这样做无法解决问题。这场闹剧没有任何意义。放了人质。”
languages.original_text: "What you have done here is not the answer. You will not achieve anything with your stunt. Let the hostage go."

traits.locale_text: “这样做无法解决问题。这场闹剧没有任何意义。放了人质。”

languages.text: « Votre petit numéro n'est pas la solution. Ce n'est pas comme ça que vous accomplirez quoi que ce soit. Libérez l'otage. »
languages.original_text: "What you have done here is not the answer. You will not achieve anything with your stunt. Let the hostage go."

traits.locale_text: « Votre petit numéro n'est pas la solution. Ce n'est pas comme ça que vous accomplirez quoi que ce soit. Libérez l'otage. »

languages.text: "Was Ihr hier getan habt, ist nicht die Antwort. Ihr werdet mit Eurer Aktion nichts erreichen. Lasst die Geisel gehen."
languages.original_text: "What you have done here is not the answer. You will not achieve anything with your stunt. Let the hostage go."

traits.locale_text: "Was Ihr hier getan habt, ist nicht die Antwort. Ihr werdet mit Eurer Aktion nichts erreichen. Lasst die Geisel gehen."
